name: arsenal-ng
title: arsenal-ng
summary: Go-based command library equipped with 200+ cybersecurity cheat-sheets
description:
Go-based command library equipped with 200+ cybersecurity cheat-sheets
Inspired by arsenal, rewritten from scratch with a focus on simplicity, speed
and developer experience.
.
The classic launcher, evolved. Fast, Go-based command library equipped with
200+ cybersecurity cheat-sheets. Just install and start hacking.

arguments.raw: -ng  Option present in package usage line for arsenal-ng.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use arsenal-ng because Go-based command library equipped with 200+ cybersecurity cheat-sheets.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use arsenal-ng as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When you need a concrete invocation, run `arsenal-ng [options] [args]` as documented upstream for arsenal-ng.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair arsenal-ng with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `arsenal-ng --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
